headline: From the pitch to the airport: Cristiano Ronaldo and Vini Jr. chosen as Brazil’s dream travel buddies, reveals KAYAK
summary: KAYAK survey reveals which football stars Brazilians would take as travel companions and how fans can discover destinations connected to their idolsSAO PAULO, June 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- KAYAK surveyed 2,000 travellers to find out which football player they'd most want to travel with, and where in Brazil they'd take them. Passport stamped for the Portuguese star Cristiano Ronaldo was chosen by 60% of respondents, followed by Vinícius Júnior (19%) and Endrick (9%). The reasons? 41% cited pe

headline: Booking Holdings’ (BKNG) Priceline Upgrades AI Assistant Penny With Anthropic’s Claude Integration
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is one of the most promising long-term stocks to buy according to analysts. On June 3, Priceline, a subsidiary and primary brand of Booking Holdings, upgraded its AI travel assistant, Penny, by integrating Anthropic’s Claude into its proprietary tech stack. This agentic tool allows users to move from initial travel ideas […]
